from google.colab import files
import pandas as pd

uploaded = files.upload()

df = pd.read_csv("01_District_wise_crimes_committed_IPC_2001_2013.csv")

df['YEAR_ORDINAL'] = df['YEAR'] - 2000

col = df.pop('YEAR_ORDINAL')
df.insert(3, 'YEAR_ORDINAL', col)

In [ ]:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

murder_by_state = df.groupby('STATE/UT')['MURDER'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)

plt.figure(figsize=(12, 8))
murder_by_state.plot(kind='bar', color='crimson')

plt.xlabel('State/UT')
plt.ylabel('Total Murders')
plt.title('Total Murders by State/UT (2001–2013)')
plt.xticks(rotation=90)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [ ]:
state_murder = df.groupby('STATE/UT')['MURDER'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)

plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
plt.scatter(x=range(len(state_murder)), y=state_murder.values, color='blue')
plt.xticks(ticks=range(len(state_murder)), labels=state_murder.index, rotation=90)

plt.xlabel("State/UT")
plt.ylabel("Total Murders")
plt.title("Total Murders by State/UT (2001–2013)")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

In [ ]:
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

ct = pd.crosstab(df['STATE/UT'], df['MURDER'])

plt.figure(figsize=(14, 10))
sns.heatmap(ct, cmap='Reds', linewidths=0.5)
plt.title('Murder Count Distribution by State/UT')
plt.xlabel('MURDER')
plt.ylabel('STATE/UT')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [ ]:
plt.figure(figsize=(6, 8))
df.boxplot(column='MURDER')
plt.title('Distribution of Murders')
plt.ylabel('Number of Murders')
plt.grid(True)
plt.show()
In [ ]:
# Select only numeric columns
numeric_df = df.select_dtypes(include=['float64', 'int64'])

# Compute correlation and plot
plt.figure(figsize=(14, 10))
sns.heatmap(numeric_df.corr(), annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', fmt=".2f", linewidths=0.5)
plt.title('Correlation Heatmap of Numeric Features')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
